job_summary: A GCP Compliance Auditor ensures that clinical trials adhere to Good Clinical Practice and regulatory standards through audits and inspections.
key_responsibilities: Conduct internal and external audits of clinical trials
Evaluate compliance of sites, processes, and documentation
Identify gaps and recommend corrective/preventive actions (CAPA)
Prepare audit reports and support inspections
qualifications: Experience in clinical research and quality assurance
skills_required: conduct internal and external audits of clinical trials
evaluate compliance of sites, processes, and documentation
identify gaps and recommend corrective/preventive actions (capa)
prepare audit reports and support inspections
